# zenfra_cloud_integrations (Data Source)

Lists all Zenfra cloud integrations in the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all AWS cloud integrations
data "zenfra_cloud_integrations" "aws" {
  provider_type = "aws"
}

# List all cloud integrations
data "zenfra_cloud_integrations" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `provider_type` (String) Optional filter by cloud provider type (e.g., aws).
- `space_id` (String) Optional filter by space ID.

### Read-Only

- `integrations` (Attributes List) List of cloud integrations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--integrations))

<a id="nestedatt--integrations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `integrations`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the cloud integration.
- `name` (String) The display name of the cloud integration.
- `provider_type` (String) The cloud provider type (e.g., aws).
- `space_id` (String) The space ID this integration is scoped to.
- `status` (String) The current status of the integration.
